message:
feat(proxy): enhance load balancer and output widgets

Load balancer:
- Improve load_balancer.rs with better connection handling
- Add health check improvements

Output:
- Enhance output/widgets.rs for TUI display
- Update proxy.rs with refined request routing

These changes improve connection reliability and provide better
visual feedback during proxy operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
